impacts.statement: Extensive and widespread flooding of farm and agricultural land is occurring. Approximately 124,000 acres are underwater.
Approximately 72,500 acres of farm and agricultural land are underwater.
Approximately 42,500 acres of farm and agricultural land are underwater.
Water is in a building on the south side of river at Newlight. Approximately 33,000 acres of farm and agricultural land are underwater.
Widespread flooding of farm and agricultural land is occurring. Approximately 23,000 acres are underwater.
Widespread agricultural and lowland flooding is occurring along and near the river.

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 24 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.
